Official fallback location for legacy Martini 2 DNA tooling.

Scope:
- this directory supports the delivered Martini 2 rescue branch
- it is not evidence that the Martini 3 dsDNA blocker is solved

Expected contents:
- `martinize-dna.py`
- `martini_v2.1-dna.itp`
- `martini_v2.1P-dna.itp`

Notes:
- the repo can bootstrap these files from the larger official `na-tutorials_20170815.tar` archive
- this directory exists only to support the fallback delivery path
